owasp_page_title: OWASP API Security Top 10 - API Security Reference Hub
owasp_subtitle: Explains the 10 most critical security risks specific to APIs and how to mitigate them.
owasp_overview_title: What is the OWASP API Security Top 10?
owasp_overview_desc: A ranking of API-specific security risks published by OWASP (Open Worldwide Application Security Project). The 2023 edition provides the latest list reflecting threats that have increased with the widespread adoption of APIs.
owasp_api1_heading: 1️⃣ API1:2023 - Broken Object Level Authorization (BOLA)
owasp_api1_overview_desc: A vulnerability that allows unauthorized access to other users' data by manipulating object IDs. It is known as the most frequently occurring and easiest to exploit vulnerability.
owasp_api1_risk_desc: Attackers can access other users' personal information, payment details, order history, and more simply by changing the ID in the URL or request parameters.
owasp_api1_bad_comment1: // Receives ID and returns data directly - no authorization check
owasp_api1_good_comment1: // Verify against authenticated user's ID for authorization check
owasp_api1_check1: Implement object-level authorization checks on all endpoints
owasp_api1_check2: Use UUIDs instead of predictable sequential IDs
owasp_api1_check4: Detect authorization bypasses with automated tests
owasp_api2_overview_desc: A vulnerability that allows attackers to take over legitimate user accounts due to flawed authentication mechanism implementations.
owasp_api2_problems_desc: Weak password policies, improper token management, lack of brute-force protection, inadequate session management, and more.
owasp_api2_comment1: // Explicitly specify algorithm (prevents alg: none attack)
owasp_api2_check1: Explicitly specify the algorithm when verifying JWT signatures
owasp_api2_check2: Set short token expiration times (access tokens: within 15 minutes)
owasp_api3_heading: 3️⃣ API3:2023 - Broken Object Property Level Authorization
owasp_api3_overview_desc: A vulnerability where access control over the properties (fields) of objects included in API responses is insufficient. This item combines Excessive Data Exposure and Mass Assignment.
owasp_api3_comment1: // Return only public fields from the user object
owasp_api3_comment2: // Only the owner can see additional fields
owasp_api3_comment3: // ❌ return user; would leak password_hash etc.
owasp_api3_check1: Explicitly specify fields to include in API responses (allowlist approach)
owasp_api3_check2: Restrict accepted request body fields using a schema
owasp_api3_check3: Dynamically filter response fields based on roles
owasp_api4_overview_desc: A vulnerability where there are no limits on API request size, frequency, or resource consumption, leading to DoS attacks or cost surges.
owasp_api5_heading: 5️⃣ API5:2023 - Broken Function Level Authorization
owasp_api5_overview_desc: A vulnerability where proper access control is not implemented for admin functions and endpoints, allowing regular users to perform administrative operations.
owasp_api6_heading: 6️⃣ API6:2023 - Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows
owasp_api6_overview_desc: A vulnerability where critical business logic flows are not protected against automated attacks. Examples: ticket scalping, mass coupon harvesting, spam posting, etc.
owasp_api7_heading: 7️⃣ API7:2023 - Server Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
owasp_api7_overview_desc: A vulnerability where the server fetches a user-supplied URL without validation, enabling unauthorized access to internal networks.
owasp_api8_overview_desc: Improper security settings on API servers or frameworks. Includes allowing unnecessary HTTP methods, overly permissive CORS policies, exposure of debug information, and more.
owasp_api8_comment2: // Error handler: do not return stack traces in production
owasp_api9_overview_desc: A state where old API endpoint versions are left exposed without security patches applied. Also known as shadow APIs or zombie APIs.
owasp_api9_check1: Document and manage all API endpoints (OpenAPI/Swagger)
owasp_api9_check2: Set clear deprecation schedules for deprecated APIs
owasp_api9_check3: Block unregistered endpoints at the API gateway
owasp_api10_heading: 🔟 API10:2023 - Unsafe Consumption of APIs
owasp_api10_overview_desc: A vulnerability where responses from third-party APIs are trusted without validation. If an external API is compromised, the impact propagates to your own system.
owasp_api10_comment1: // Validate external API responses with a schema
owasp_table_api2_mitigation: Proper token management and brute-force protection
owasp_table_api4_mitigation: Rate limiting and payload size restrictions
owasp_table_api7_mitigation: URL validation and private IP blocking
owasp_table_api9_mitigation: API inventory management and deprecation policies
owasp_table_api10_mitigation: Schema validation of external API responses
